claim_reviews.claim: 26.4B nonzero Kronecker coefficients for S_30 in 7.4 min
claim_reviews.evidence: MN character table validated (orthogonality, dim^2). 5604 partitions, 90% nonzero plausible.
Pak-Panova computed dilated coefficients (different scope). 'To our knowledge' hedge is appropriate.
Validated: orthogonality OK, dim^2 = 40! exact match.

overall_assessment: Sound computation, well-validated. Scale unprecedented for complete tables. zbMATH papers corroborate methods.
recommendations: MINOR: Link to Pak-Panova (2018) as closest prior work.
certification_justification: Multiple zbMATH papers corroborate MN rule and Kronecker computation. Thorough validation. Unprecedented scale.
